```{r single_net_plot_slr_us, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
legend(0.65, 1.1, cex = 1, title = "Estimated association:",
       legend = c("+","-"), lty = 1, lwd = 3, col = c("gray50","red3"), 
       bty = "n", horiz = TRUE, xpd = NA)
```


#### SPRING

```{r generate_net_single_spring}
path_net_single_spring <- path_target("net_single_spring.rds")

if (file.exists(path_net_single_spring) && !refit_complete_network) {
  net_single_spring <- readRDS(path_net_single_spring)
} else {
  net_single_spring <- NetCoMi::netConstruct(
    data = counts_rel,
    measure = "spring",
    measurePar = list(nlambda = 30, 
                      rep.num = 30,
                      thresh  = 0.1,
                      Rmethod = "approx"),
    filtTax = "none",
    filtSamp = "none",
    normMethod = "none",
    zeroMethod = "none",
    sparsMethod = "none",
    seed = 42
  )
  
  saveRDS(net_single_spring, path_net_single_spring)
}
```

```{r}
props_single_spring <- netAnalyze(net_single_spring,
                                       centrLCC = TRUE,
                                       clustMethod = "cluster_fast_greedy",
                                       hubPar = "eigenvector",
                                       weightDeg = FALSE, 
                                       normDeg = FALSE,
                                       normBetw = FALSE,
                                       normClose = FALSE,
                                       normEigen = FALSE)
```


```{r}
spring_plot_labels <- make_network_plot_labels(
  props = props_single_spring,
  top_abundant_taxa = top_abundant_taxa,
  da_taxa = da_plot_taxa,
  dd_taxa = dd_plot_taxa,
  n_abundant = 10,
  n_central = 10,
  label_overrides = network_label_overrides
)

taxa_to_plot <- spring_plot_labels$taxa_to_plot
network_labels <- spring_plot_labels$labels
```

```{r single_net_plot_spring, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
p <- plot(props_single_spring,
     #layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.6,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     edgeTranspLow = 30,
     showTitle = FALSE,
     cexLabels = 0.9,
     cexHubLabels = 0.9,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 7, 1, 3))

# Colors used in the legend should be equally transparent as in the plot
phylcol_transp <- colToTransp(phylcol, 40)

# xpd = NA allows drawing outside the plot region into the margins
legend(-1.7, 1.1, cex = 1, pt.cex = 2.5, title = "Phylum:", 
       legend=levels(phyla), col = phylcol_transp, bty = "n", pch = 16,
       xpd = NA) 

legend(0.65, 1.1, cex = 1, title = "Estimated association:",
       legend = c("+","-"), lty = 1, lwd = 3, col = c("gray50","red3"), 
       bty = "n", horiz = TRUE, xpd = NA)
```

```{r}
layout_spring <- p$layout$layout1
layout_spring["Faecalibacterium", ] <- c(-0.436, 0.75)
```


```{r single_net_plot_spring_ownlay, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(props_single_spring,
     layout = layout_spring,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.899,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     edgeTranspLow = 30,
     showTitle = FALSE,
     cexLabels = 0.9,
     cexHubLabels = 0.9,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 7, 1, 3))

# Colors used in the legend should be equally transparent as in the plot
phylcol_transp <- colToTransp(phylcol, 40)

# xpd = NA allows drawing outside the plot region into the margins
legend(-1.7, 1.1, cex = 1, pt.cex = 2.5, title = "Phylum:", 
       legend=levels(phyla), col = phylcol_transp, bty = "n", pch = 16,
       xpd = NA) 

legend(0.65, 1.1, cex = 1, title = "Estimated association:",
       legend = c("+","-"), lty = 1, lwd = 3, col = c("gray50","red3"), 
       bty = "n", horiz = TRUE, xpd = NA)
```

```{r single_net_plot_spring_nolabs, fig.width=5.8, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(props_single_spring,
     layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.8999999,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     showTitle = TRUE,
     title1 = "SPRING",
     cexTitle = 1.8,
     cexLabels = 0,
     cexHubLabels = 0,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1))
```

```{r single_net_plot_spring_slrlay_nolabs, fig.width=5.8, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(props_single_spring,
     layout = layout_slr,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.8999999,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     showTitle = TRUE,
     title1 = "SPRING",
     cexTitle = 1.8,
     cexLabels = 0,
     cexHubLabels = 0,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1))
```


#### SPRING (unsigned)

```{r generate_net_single_spring_us}
path_net_single_spring_us <- path_target("net_single_spring_us.rds")

if (file.exists(path_net_single_spring_us) && !refit_complete_network) {
  net_single_spring_us <- readRDS(path_net_single_spring_us)
} else {
  net_single_spring_us <- NetCoMi::netConstruct(
    data = counts_rel,
    measure = "spring",
    measurePar = list(nlambda = 30, 
                      rep.num = 30,
                      thresh  = 0.1,
                      Rmethod = "approx"),
    filtTax = "none",
    filtSamp = "none",
    normMethod = "none",
    zeroMethod = "none",
    sparsMethod = "none",
    dissFunc = "unsigned",
    seed = 42
  )
  
  saveRDS(net_single_spring_us, path_net_single_spring_us)
}
```

```{r}
props_single_spring_us <- netAnalyze(net_single_spring_us,
                                       centrLCC = TRUE,
                                       clustMethod = "cluster_fast_greedy",
                                       hubPar = "eigenvector",
                                       weightDeg = FALSE, 
                                       normDeg = FALSE,
                                       normBetw = FALSE,
                                       normClose = FALSE,
                                       normEigen = FALSE)
```


```{r}
spring_plot_labels_us <- make_network_plot_labels(
  props = props_single_spring_us,
  top_abundant_taxa = top_abundant_taxa,
  da_taxa = da_plot_taxa,
  dd_taxa = dd_plot_taxa,
  n_abundant = 10,
  n_central = 10,
  label_overrides = network_label_overrides
)

taxa_to_plot <- spring_plot_labels_us$taxa_to_plot
network_labels <- spring_plot_labels_us$labels
```

```{r single_net_plot_spring_us, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
p <- plot(props_single_spring_us,
     #layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.99,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     edgeTranspLow = 30,
     showTitle = FALSE,
     cexLabels = 0.9,
     cexHubLabels = 0.9,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 7, 1, 3))

# Colors used in the legend should be equally transparent as in the plot
phylcol_transp <- colToTransp(phylcol, 40)

# xpd = NA allows drawing outside the plot region into the margins
legend(-1.7, 1.1, cex = 1, pt.cex = 2.5, title = "Phylum:", 
       legend=levels(phyla), col = phylcol_transp, bty = "n", pch = 16,
       xpd = NA) 

legend(0.65, 1.1, cex = 1, title = "Estimated association:",
       legend = c("+","-"), lty = 1, lwd = 3, col = c("gray50","red3"), 
       bty = "n", horiz = TRUE, xpd = NA)
```

```{r single_net_plot_spring_us_nolabs, fig.width=5.8, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(props_single_spring_us,
     layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.8999999,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "mclr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     showTitle = TRUE,
     title1 = "SPRING",
     cexTitle = 1.8,
     cexLabels = 0,
     cexHubLabels = 0,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1))
```

#### Shrinkage proportionality

```{r generate_net_single_rhoshrink_nothresh}
net_single_rhoshrink_nothresh <- NetCoMi::netConstruct(
  data = counts_rel_multrepl,
  measure = "rhoshrink",
  filtTax = "none",
  filtSamp = "none",
  normMethod = "none",
  zeroMethod = "pseudo",
  zeroPar = list(pseudocount = 0),
  sparsMethod = "none",
  seed = 42
)

assomat_single_rhoshrink <- net_single_rhoshrink_nothresh$assoMat1
adjamat_single_rhoshrink <- net_single_rhoshrink_nothresh$adjaMat1
```

```{r single_rhoshrink_histrogram, fig.width=8, fig.height=2}
n_zero_asso <- 
  sum(assomat_single_rhoshrink[lower.tri(assomat_single_rhoshrink)] == 0)

data.frame(correlation = assomat_single_rhoshrink[lower.tri(assomat_single_rhoshrink)]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = correlation)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.005) +
  labs(x = "Estimated correlation",
       y = "Count",
       #title = "Estimated correlations after sparsification"
       ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
  )
```

```{r generate_net_single_rhoshrink}
path_net_single_rhoshrink <- path_target("net_single_rhoshrink.rds")

if (file.exists(path_net_single_rhoshrink) && !refit_complete_network) {
  net_single_rhoshrink <- readRDS(path_net_single_rhoshrink)
} else {
  net_single_rhoshrink <- NetCoMi::netConstruct(
    data = counts_rel_multrepl,
    measure = "rhoshrink",
    filtTax = "none",
    filtSamp = "none",
    normMethod = "none",
    zeroMethod = "pseudo",
    zeroPar = list(pseudocount = 0),
    sparsMethod = "threshold",
    thresh = 0.2,
    seed = 42
  )
  
  saveRDS(net_single_rhoshrink, path_net_single_rhoshrink)
}
```

```{r}
props_single_rhoshrink <- netAnalyze(net_single_rhoshrink,
                                       centrLCC = TRUE,
                                       clustMethod = "cluster_fast_greedy",
                                       hubPar = "eigenvector",
                                       weightDeg = FALSE, 
                                       normDeg = FALSE,
                                       normBetw = FALSE,
                                       normClose = FALSE,
                                       normEigen = FALSE)

rhoshrink_plot_labels <- make_network_plot_labels(
  props = props_single_rhoshrink,
  top_abundant_taxa = top_abundant_taxa,
  da_taxa = da_plot_taxa,
  dd_taxa = dd_plot_taxa,
  n_abundant = n_abundant_network_labels,
  n_central = n_central_network_labels,
  label_overrides = network_label_overrides
)

taxa_to_plot <- rhoshrink_plot_labels$taxa_to_plot
network_labels <- rhoshrink_plot_labels$labels
```

```{r single_net_plot_rhoshrink, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
p <- plot(props_single_rhoshrink,
     layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.899,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "clr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     showTitle = FALSE,
     cexLabels = 0.9,
     cexHubLabels = 0.9,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 7, 1, 3))

# Colors used in the legend should be equally transparent as in the plot
phylcol_transp <- colToTransp(phylcol, 40)

# xpd = NA allows drawing outside the plot region into the margins
legend(-1.7, 1.1, cex = 1, pt.cex = 2.5, title = "Phylum:", 
       legend=levels(phyla), col = phylcol_transp, bty = "n", pch = 16,
       xpd = NA) 

legend(0.65, 1.1, cex = 1, title = "Estimated association:",
       legend = c("+","-"), lty = 1, lwd = 3, col = c("gray50","red3"), 
       bty = "n", horiz = TRUE, xpd = NA)
```

```{r single_net_plot_rhoshrink_nolabs, fig.width=5.8, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(props_single_rhoshrink,
     layout = layout,
     nodeFilter = "names",
     nodeFilterPar = taxa_to_plot,
     labelScale = FALSE,
     labels = network_labels,
     repulsion = 0.8999999,
     nodeColor = "feature", 
     featVecCol = phyla, 
     colorVec =  phylcol,
     nodeSize = "clr",
     nodeSizeSpread = 4,
     cexNodes = 2,
     nodeTransp = 40,
     hubTransp = 40,
     posCol = "gray50", 
     negCol = "red3",
     showTitle = TRUE,
     title1 = "Shrinkage proportionality",
     cexTitle = 1.8,
     cexLabels = 0,
     cexHubLabels = 0,
     hubBorderCol = "gray40",
     mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1))
```

## Summary of edge overlap

The following UpSet-style plots compare the edge sets of the networks shown
above. Edges are encoded as present or absent based on the adjacency matrix. For
this summary, only the signed versions of the networks are included.

### Prevalence filtering

```{r edge_upset_prevalence, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
networks_prevalence <- list(
  "1% prevalence" = net_single_main,
  "5% prevalence" = net_single_prev05,
  "10% prevalence" = net_single_prev10
)

edge_presence_prevalence <- make_edge_presence(networks_prevalence)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_prevalence,
  title = "Shared edges across prevalence filters",
  networks = networks_prevalence,
  shared_text_size = 4
)
```

```{r edge_upset_prevalence8, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi=250}
networks_prevalence <- list(
  "1% prevalence" = net_single_main,
  "5% prevalence" = net_single_prev05,
  "10% prevalence" = net_single_prev10
)

edge_presence_prevalence <- make_edge_presence(networks_prevalence)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_prevalence,
  title = "Shared edges across prevalence filters",
  networks = networks_prevalence,
  shared_text_size = 4,
  n_shared_edges = 8
)
```

### Zero replacement

```{r edge_upset_zero_replacement, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
networks_zero_replacement <- list(
  "multiplicative" = net_single_main,
  #"multiplicative sample-wise" = net_single_zero_multrepl_sample,
  "random pseudo count" = net_single_zero_random,
  "Modified EM alr" = net_single_zero_alrEM,
  "Bayesian mult." = net_single_zero_bayesMult
)

edge_presence_zero_replacement <- make_edge_presence(networks_zero_replacement)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_zero_replacement,
  title = "Shared edges across zero-replacement methods",
  networks = networks_zero_replacement,
  shared_text_size = 4
)
```

```{r edge_upset_zero_replacement8, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi=250}
networks_zero_replacement <- list(
  "multiplicative" = net_single_main,
  #"multiplicative sample-wise" = net_single_zero_multrepl_sample,
  "random pseudo count" = net_single_zero_random,
  "Modified EM alr" = net_single_zero_alrEM,
  "Bayesian mult." = net_single_zero_bayesMult
)

edge_presence_zero_replacement <- make_edge_presence(networks_zero_replacement)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_zero_replacement,
  title = "Shared edges across zero-replacement methods",
  networks = networks_zero_replacement,
  shared_text_size = 4,
  n_shared_edges = 8
)
```

### Association measure

```{r edge_upset_association, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
networks_association <- list(
  "SPIEC-EASI MB" = net_single_main,
  "SPIEC-EASI SLR" = net_single_slr,
  "SPRING" = net_single_spring
  #"rho shrinkage" = net_single_rhoshrink
)

edge_presence_association <- make_edge_presence(networks_association)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_association,
  title = "Shared edges across association measures",
  networks = networks_association,
  shared_text_size = 4
)
```

```{r edge_upset_association8, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi=250}
networks_association <- list(
  "SPIEC-EASI MB" = net_single_main,
  "SPIEC-EASI SLR" = net_single_slr,
  "SPRING" = net_single_spring
  #"rho shrinkage" = net_single_rhoshrink
)

edge_presence_association <- make_edge_presence(networks_association)

plot_edge_upset(
  edge_presence_association,
  title = "Shared edges across association measures",
  networks = networks_association,
  shared_text_size = 4,
  n_shared_edges = 8
)
```

## Persistent edges across selected networks

The following summary uses a selected set of signed networks and identifies
taxa-pairs that are connected in all of them.

```{r select_persistent_edge_networks}
persistent_edge_networks <- list(
  "1% prevalence / multiplicative / SPIEC-EASI mb" = net_single_main,
  "5% prevalence" = net_single_prev05,
  "10% prevalence" = net_single_prev10,
  #"pseudo count" = net_single_zero_pseudo,
  #"multiplicative sample-wise" = net_single_zero_multrepl_sample,
  "random pseudo count" = net_single_zero_random,
  "Modified EM alr" = net_single_zero_alrEM,
  "Bayesian mult." = net_single_zero_bayesMult,
  "SPIEC-EASI slr" = net_single_slr,
  "SPRING" = net_single_spring
  #"rho shrinkage" = net_single_rhoshrink
)

persistent_edges <- summarise_persistent_edges(persistent_edge_networks)
```

```{r persistent_edge_table}
persistent_edges %>%
  mutate(
    mean_association = round(mean_association, 3),
    min_association = round(min_association, 3),
    max_association = round(max_association, 3),
    mean_abs_association = round(mean_abs_association, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    taxon1_label,
    taxon2_label,
    n_methods,
    mean_association,
    min_association,
    max_association,
    mean_abs_association
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kbl(
    caption = "Taxa-pairs connected in all selected signed networks.",
    col.names = c(
      "Taxon 1",
      "Taxon 2",
      "Networks",
      "Mean association",
      "Minimum",
      "Maximum",
      "Mean absolute association"
    )
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r persistent_edge_network_prepare}
persistent_taxa <- persistent_edges %>%
  select(taxon1, taxon2) %>%
  unlist(use.names = FALSE) %>%
  unique()

net_single_persistent <- make_persistent_edge_network(
  network = net_single_main,
  persistent_edges = persistent_edges
)

props_single_persistent <- netAnalyze(
  net_single_persistent,
  centrLCC = TRUE,
  clustMethod = "cluster_fast_greedy",
  hubPar = "eigenvector",
  weightDeg = FALSE, 
  normDeg = FALSE,
  normBetw = FALSE,
  normClose = FALSE,
  normEigen = FALSE
)

persistent_network_labels <- setNames(
  rep("", ncol(net_single_persistent$adjaMat1)),
  colnames(net_single_persistent$adjaMat1)
)

persistent_label_taxa <- intersect(persistent_taxa, names(persistent_network_labels))
persistent_network_labels[persistent_label_taxa] <- persistent_label_taxa

label_override_taxa <- intersect(
  names(network_label_overrides),
  persistent_label_taxa
)
persistent_network_labels[label_override_taxa] <- 
  network_label_overrides[label_override_taxa]

persistent_layout <- layout[
  intersect(rownames(layout), colnames(net_single_persistent$adjaMat1)),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]
```

```{r persistent_edge_network_plot, fig.width=5.9, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
plot(
  props_single_persistent,
  layout = persistent_layout,
  nodeFilter = "names",
  nodeFilterPar = persistent_taxa,
  labelScale = FALSE,
  labels = persistent_network_labels,
  repulsion = 0.899,
  nodeColor = "feature", 
  featVecCol = phyla, 
  colorVec =  phylcol,
  nodeSize = "clr",
  nodeSizeSpread = 4,
  cexNodes = 2,
  nodeTransp = 40,
  hubTransp = 40,
  posCol = "gray50", 
  negCol = "red3",
  showTitle = TRUE,
  title1 = "Persistent edges",
  cexTitle = 1.8,
  cexLabels = 1,
  hubLabelFont = 0.9,
  cexHubLabels = 0.9,
  hubBorderCol = "gray40",
  mar = c(1, 1, 3, 2))
```


## Files written

These files have been written to the target directory, ```r paste0("data/", params$name)```:

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target())
```
